title: myriopteris covillei
intro: Myriopteris covillei, also known as Coville's strap fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Adiantaceae, characterized by its delicate, strap-like fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Myriopteris covillei include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, but more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and safe usage.
